'''bazuwu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:headlease|headlease]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-z-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:headlease|headlease]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| bazuwu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:bæziwith|bæziwith]] || [[word:bæziwij|bæziwij]] || [[word:bæziwish|bæziwish]] || [[word:bæziwi|bæziwi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:bazuzuwuth|bazuzuwuth]] || [[word:bazuzuwuj|bazuzuwuj]] || [[word:bazuzuwush|bazuzuwush]] || [[word:bazuzuwu|bazuzuwu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:bazuwuth|bazuwuth]] || [[word:bazuwuj|bazuwuj]] || [[word:bazuwush|bazuwush]] || [[word:bazuwu|bazuwu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:bazufwuth|bazufwuth]] || [[word:bazufwuj|bazufwuj]] || [[word:bazufwush|bazufwush]] || [[word:bazufwuf|bazufwuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:bazuwuthu|bazuwuthu]] || [[word:bazuwuju|bazuwuju]] || [[word:bazuwushu|bazuwushu]] || [[word:bazuwuku|bazuwuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:bazuwuth|bazuwuth]] || [[word:bazuwuj|bazuwuj]] || [[word:bazuwush|bazuwush]] || [[word:bazuwu|bazuwu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:bazuwuthul|bazuwuthul]] || [[word:bazuwujul|bazuwujul]] || [[word:bazuwushul|bazuwushul]] || [[word:bazuwukul|bazuwukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:bazuwuthuthu|bazuwuthuthu]] || [[word:bazuwujuju|bazuwujuju]] || [[word:bazuwushushu|bazuwushushu]] || [[word:bazuwuku|bazuwuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:bazuwuthun|bazuwuthun]] || [[word:bazuwujun|bazuwujun]] || [[word:bazuwushun|bazuwushun]] || [[word:bazuwukun|bazuwukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:bazuwuthuoro|bazuwuthuoro]] || [[word:bazuwujuoro|bazuwujuoro]] || [[word:bazuwushuoro|bazuwushuoro]] || [[word:bazuwukuoro|bazuwukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
